• Procedural world generator with ore tiers, mining speed scaling, and AOE mining.
  • Multiplayer sync via MQTT, host election, admin panel, chat, and trade modal.
  • Custom UI: gauges (multiple styles), station, minimap, modals, and texture importer.
    new GameEngine().init()
    Shop.buy('drill')

This game creates a large tile map using seeded randomness, lets players mine, build, and trade resources, and synchronizes state over MQTT with host fallback logic. It includes a modular UI system for HUD gauges, inventory, shop upgrades, chat, and custom texture loading.
